questions.question: Which visual pattern attracts you the most?
Where do you imagine your tattoo?

options.text: Arm or back, a bold piece
A visible spot where detail shines

questions.question: What does this tattoo represent to you?

options.text: A person, place or moment frozen in time

questions.question: Which of these best describes you?
How long would you tolerate a session?

options.text: Not long, I prefer something quick
As long as it takes for impact
As many sessions as it takes to get it perfect

fineline.name: Fineline
fineline.description: You connect with subtlety and precision. Thin, continuous lines where every stroke carries symbolic weight without shouting.

blackwork.name: Blackwork
blackwork.description: You seek presence and contrast. Solid pieces with strong visual impact that last.

abstract.name: Abstract / Flow-line
abstract.description: You think in curves and movement. Your tattoo follows the body like a natural flow, without rigidity.

geometric.name: Geometric
geometric.description: You value structure and purpose. Symmetry and patterns that communicate order and intention.

realism.name: Realism / Micro-realism
realism.description: You want to capture the world as it is — with depth, texture and emotion. Every detail tells the story.
